content: Infrastructure file set for greenhouse: README.md (install, quickstart, CLI reference, design principles, os-eco links), CHANGELOG.md (Keep a Changelog format), CONTRIBUTING.md (dev setup, quality gates, code style, testing, versioning), LICENSE (MIT 2026 Jaymin West), CODEOWNERS (* @jayminwest), SECURITY.md (report to jayminwest@gmail.com 48h response), .github/workflows/ci.yml (exact SPEC.md match), .github/workflows/publish.yml (package.json path trigger, bunx npm publish, auto-tag, gh release), scripts/version-bump.ts (updates package.json + src/cli.ts VERSION constant), .claude/commands/release.md (quality gates, bump, changelog, commit, push)
